Case# TKSmartCardSlot.State.empty

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.10+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
case empty
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardSlot/State-swift.enum/empty#Discussion)

The Smart Card reader slot is empty; no card is inserted.
